overall.description: A nighttime scene from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character leading and riding a horse through a wilderness grassland, illuminated by a handheld lantern. The character travels from a dirt path through tall grass to reach a vibrant geothermal hot spring, eventually dismounting to explore the mineral formations on foot.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through open grassland with distant mountains

events.description: character mounts the horse and transitions from walking to riding

agents.ego_description: leading the horse by the reins along a dirt path, holding a lantern to light the way

notable_agents.action: horse being led by the character, walking calmly alongside on the path

entered.detail: unpaved trail winding through the grassland with light-colored earth
dark mountain range silhouetted against the starry night sky
sparse pine trees dotting the landscape
geothermal steam rising from a distant hot spring

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark night in the wilderness, with the character walking along a dirt path while leading a horse. The lantern casts a warm glow on the path ahead, revealing distant mountains and scattered trees under a clear starry sky. Steam from a distant geothermal feature rises on the right as the character prepares to mount the horse.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass prairie with scattered fence posts

agents.ego_description: riding the horse through tall grass at a steady pace, holding the reins and lantern

notable_agents.action: horse carrying the rider through the grassland, navigating around rocks and vegetation

entered.detail: golden-brown tall grass covering the ground in the prairie
weathered wooden posts marking a boundary line through the field
large boulder partially hidden in the grass

segments.scene_description: Now mounted on the horse, the character rides through dense tall grass in the open prairie. Wooden fence posts line the left side while scattered trees pass by on the right. The lantern illuminates the path ahead as the horse trots steadily toward the distant steam plume, with the mountains now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring with colorful mineral deposits

events.description: arriving at the edge of a vibrant blue hot spring surrounded by colorful mineral crust
character dismounts the horse and continues exploring on foot around the pool edge

agents.ego_description: riding around the hot spring then dismounting to lead the horse on foot along the mineral formations

notable_agents.action: horse being ridden then led around the hot spring, carefully stepping on the rocky mineral crust

entered.detail: circular geothermal pool with vibrant turquoise water and colorful mineral deposits
white and yellow mineral formations lining the edge of the hot spring
rough ground with mineral deposits and stones surrounding the pool

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a stunning geothermal hot spring, the water glowing turquoise in the lantern light against the dark night. Riding around the pool's edge, the horse navigates the colorful mineral crust and rocky terrain. After circling partway, the character dismounts and continues on foot, leading the horse around the steaming waters as the camera captures the vibrant mineral formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark wilderness that transforms from a lonely dirt path into a vibrant geothermal landscape. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail under a starry sky, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow on the ground and distant mountains. As the character mounts the horse, the scene shifts into a steady trot through dense prairie grass and past wooden fence posts, moving closer to a rising plume of steam. The environment then opens up to reveal a stunning hot spring with turquoise water and colorful mineral crusts that glow under the lantern light. Finally, the camera follows the character as they dismount to explore the steaming waters and rocky formations on foot.
